title: You only live twice Shinji
wikitext:
[]: You only live twice, Shinji...             Quote Post by DIDDY » Sun Oct 04, 2009 12:29 am So I was watching ep. 9 for the umpteenth time yesterday, and thought I should get around to making this, now that I have some free time on my hands: Don't know if it was meant to be a reference to You Only Live Twice ... I also don't know if this was already mentionned on the forums (if it was I apologize ). It's not in the "Tributes to Other Fiction in Neon Genesis Evangelion" section of the wiki (not that it should be, haha), so probably not. But anyway, the first time I saw ep. 9, I thought: "You Only Live Twice!" Anyone else?

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Sun Oct 04, 2009 12:31 am Glad to see I'm not the only one who's thought that. :: Laughs::

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Sun Oct 04, 2009 12:58 am Maybe I should show my GoldenEva 007 vid.

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Sun Oct 04, 2009 1:12 am scarmullet wrote: Maybe I should show my GoldenEva 007 vid.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sun Oct 04, 2009 2:50 am Shinji would be the whimpiest 007 agen.... scarmullet wrote: Maybe I should show my GoldenEva 007 vid.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Oct 04, 2009 3:49 am Framing people between body parts seems to be part of Anno's directorial alphabet; I doubt VERY seriously it's any kind of reference/homage.

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Sun Oct 04, 2009 4:24 am There are other examples of that framing in NGE. For example, Misato in episode #07 and Asuka in #22 and probably others that I don't remember right now, usually (always?) with Shinji at the centre.

[]:             Quote Post by roblucci01 » Sun Oct 04, 2009 9:10 am Great find.

[]: Re: You only live twice, Shinji...             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Oct 04, 2009 9:39 am DIDDY wrote: Don't know if it was meant to be a reference to You Only Live Twice ...

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Sun Oct 04, 2009 2:47 pm omg. I read this thread and Saw the video... now th image of Shinji bedding ALL the women in eva wont get out of my head....and using a piece of crap walther ppk..

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun Oct 04, 2009 4:18 pm Funny you should bring this up, because I had an idea for a fan art crossover pic with Shinji as Bond and Asuka and Rei as Bond girls. Maybe I should revisit that at some point!

[]:             Quote Post by Akira » Sun Oct 04, 2009 5:02 pm Doubt it, but still interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun Oct 04, 2009 7:16 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: Framing people between body parts seems to be part of Anno's directorial alphabet; I doubt VERY seriously it's any kind of reference/homage.

[]:             Quote Post by DIDDY » Sun Oct 04, 2009 9:01 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: I am sure however that the songbed that's played at the very end of each episode of Evangelion is a sampling of the 007 theme however http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=178056#178056

[]:             Quote Post by Adekis » Sun Oct 04, 2009 9:14 pm scarmullet wrote: Maybe I should show my GoldenEva 007 vid.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Oct 05, 2009 3:47 pm I saw such shots in countless movies, and a reference always refers to a iconic, memorable part, not some random shot.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Oct 05, 2009 8:07 pm Timstuff wrote: Funny you should bring this up, because I had an idea for a fan art crossover pic with Shinji as Bond and Asuka and Rei as Bond girls. Maybe I should revisit that at some point!

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Mon Oct 05, 2009 8:57 pm thewayneiac wrote: Timstuff wrote: Funny you should bring this up, because I had an idea for a fan art crossover pic with Shinji as Bond and Asuka and Rei as Bond girls. Maybe I should revisit that at some point!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Oct 06, 2009 12:58 am MatrixRefugee wrote: @ Mr. Tines. Dooo it! Dooo it! Dooo it!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Tue Oct 06, 2009 1:03 am I'm guessing either make a recording of yourself as Goldfinger/Keel, or write a fan fic based on that premise.
summary: []: You only live twice, Shinji...             Quote Post by DIDDY » Sun Oct 04, 2009 12:29 am So I was watching ep. 9 for the umpteenth time yesterday, and thought I should get around to making this, now that I have some free time on my hands: Don't know if it was meant to be a reference to You Only Live Twice ...
